LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-04-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ROBERTO ANDRADE'S MOTION TO DISMISS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER PAGA" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2024 Vacated

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ROBERTO ANDRADE's MOTION TO DISMISS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss without prejudice the cause of action under PAGA" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Set For Trial On May-06-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
